title: RuoYi Java 侧学习中心聚合扩字段 + 测验历史端点 + DB migration
description: TASK-005 在 FastAPI 侧落地了 /learning-coach/quiz/history 但 RuoYi Java 端 GET /internal/xiaomai/learning/results/quiz/{quiz_id} 未实现，导致 503。TASK-007 在 FastAPI 侧扩了聚合响应 3 字段但 RuoYi 端聚合没返回这些字段。本 task 把两侧的 RuoYi Java/DB 侧全部补齐，并让 FastAPI 的 submit_quiz 写入每题明细到 xm_quiz_result.question_items_json 以供历史回看。
action: 1) DB migration: ALTER xm_learning_path ADD completed_step_count INT DEFAULT 0 + total_step_count INT DEFAULT 0；ALTER xm_quiz_result ADD question_items_json JSON NULL。同步更新 packages/RuoYi-Vue-Plus-5.X/script/sql/xm_dev.sql。2) RuoYi Java: XmLearningResultController 新增 @GetMapping('/internal/xiaomai/learning/results/quiz/{quizId}') 根据 source_result_id 查 xm_quiz_result 返回 VO（含 questionItemsJson 解析）。3) RuoYi Java: XmLearningCenterController 的聚合接口响应 VO 扩三字段 averageQuizScore/latestRecommendation/activeLearningPath，对应 Mapper SQL 聚合 SELECT AVG(score) FROM xm_quiz_result + SELECT * FROM xm_learning_recommendation ORDER BY source_time DESC LIMIT 1 + SELECT * FROM xm_learning_path ORDER BY source_time DESC LIMIT 1。4) FastAPI: submit_quiz 持久化时把 items（含题干/选项/用户答/正解/解析）序列化为 JSON 写入 xm_quiz_result.question_items_json（通过 learning/service.py 的 _to_ruoyi_record 加 questionItemsJson 字段）。5) FastAPI 的 LearningService.fetch_quiz_history 把 RuoYi 返回的 questionItemsJson 反序列化为 items 列表。

criteria: docker exec dev-mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e "DESC xm_dev.xm_learning_path" shows 'completed_step_count' and 'total_step_count' columns
docker exec dev-mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e "DESC xm_dev.xm_quiz_result" shows 'question_items_json' column
RuoYi Java code contains a new endpoint pattern matching '/internal/xiaomai/learning/results/quiz/' with path variable
cd packages/fastapi-backend && uv run pytest tests/unit/learning tests/unit/learning_coach -x exits 0
convergence.verification: mysql DESC 显示新列；FastAPI 跑 /learning-coach/quiz/history/{test_id} 不再 503；聚合接口返回三字段
convergence.definition_of_done: RuoYi 侧三表 + 两端点就绪；FastAPI 能完整读写；TASK-008 前端可基于真字段渲染

implementation: 连接 docker dev-mysql (root/root) xm_dev 执行 ALTER 加列
同步更新 xm_dev.sql 文件（追加 ALTER 或改 CREATE TABLE）
找到 LearningResultMapper.xml + 对应 Java entity/VO，加 questionItemsJson 字段
新增或扩展 Controller：GET /internal/xiaomai/learning/results/quiz/{quizId}，根据 source_result_id = quizId 或 detail_ref = quizId 查询，返回包含 questionItemsJson 解析的 VO
XmLearningCenterController 聚合响应 VO 扩三字段，Mapper SQL 加聚合子查询（averageQuizScore/latestRecommendation/activeLearningPath）
FastAPI learning/service.py 的 LearningPersistenceItem schema 加 question_items_json 字段，_to_ruoyi_record 输出 questionItemsJson
FastAPI learning_coach/service.py submit_quiz 在构造 quiz record 时把 items 序列化传入
FastAPI learning/service.py fetch_quiz_history 解析 questionItemsJson 反序列化
跑 pytest 确认无回归；手工 curl /api/v1/learning-coach/quiz/history/{id} 确认 200

commands: cd packages/fastapi-backend && uv run pytest tests/unit/learning tests/unit/learning_coach -x
docker exec dev-mysql mysql -uroot -proot -e "DESC xm_dev.xm_quiz_result; DESC xm_dev.xm_learning_path;"
